# CoSky

> High-Performance Microservice Governance Platform — Service Discovery & Configuration backed by Redis. Lightweight, zero-extra-infrastructure, 100K+ QPS standard / 70M+ QPS with consistency caching.

## Getting Started

- [Overview](wiki/guide/index.md)
- [Getting Started](wiki/guide/getting-started.md)
- [Installation](wiki/guide/installation.md)

- [Architecture Overview](wiki/guide/architecture.md)
